raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus primarily on sentence-level writing polish, or on substantive argumentative/content validity?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation points to a single paragraph and asks only to look at it, making sentence- and paragraph-level readability the most central likely responsibility.","RX.1":"The agent must disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and could imply different forms of review.","RX.2":"The agent must avoid overclaiming about benchmark validity, results, or literature beyond what the paragraph provides.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within merely projecting the delegation rather than editing, critiquing, or executing it.","RX.4":"The agent must avoid enabling misleading scientific claims or unsupported presentation of drug-discovery benchmark results.","RX.5":"The projection must remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the provided paragraph."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus primarily on sentence-level writing polish, or on substantive argumentative/content validity?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation points to a single paragraph and asks only to look at it, making sentence- and paragraph-level readability the most central likely responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: The agent must disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and could imply different forms of review.
rationale.RX.2: The agent must avoid overclaiming about benchmark validity, results, or literature beyond what the paragraph provides.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within merely projecting the delegation rather than editing, critiquing, or executing it.
rationale.RX.4: The agent must avoid enabling misleading scientific claims or unsupported presentation of drug-discovery benchmark results.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the provided paragraph.
